name: The Last Roman Village
short_description: Defend the last stronghold of the Roman Empire! Build and upgrade towers, walls, and structures. Train an army of archers and legionaries to fight enemy hordes and unique bosses in this mix of strategy and tower defense.
detailed_description:
🚨 The Last Roman Village 2 is in development!



🛡️ What’s New in The Last Roman Village 2

  • 🧱 Full 3D visuals – Stunning Roman environments, detailed characters, and epic battles brought to life in a rich 3D world

  • 🏗️ Build your village in full depth – Place, rotate, and upgrade buildings with full camera control

  • ⚔️ Real-time combat – Play as the General, fight with sword and magic, and lead your army from the front lines

  • 🗺️ Open world campaign map – Conquer new territories, unlock regions, and discover secrets on a dynamic world map

  • 🧙 Magic system & artifacts – Unlock rare spells, scrolls, and legendary treasures to gain the upper hand

  • 👹 Epic enemies & bosses – Battle orcs, trolls, ghouls, dragons, and God Orcus himself in massive showdowns

  • 🎴 Cards of Destiny system – Spin for powerful boosts, soldiers, rare scrolls, and risks after each boss fight

  • 📜 Meaningful choices – Decisions that impact your journey, allies, and story outcomes

  • 🌦️ Atmospheric world – Dynamic weather, immersive soundtrack, and cinematic moments

  • 🎮 Planned multiplayer & surprises – More features will be revealed as the game develops

  • 🛡️ No microtransactions, no pay-to-win — one full experience


About the Game

The time of peace is over. The Roman Empire has fallen.

Now it’s up to General Marcus Aurelius to defend the last Roman village and preserve what remains of a once-great civilization. Enemy forces attack from both sides — you must balance your defenses, spend your gold wisely, and lead your people through chaos.

Only through strategy, courage, and a little luck can you prove that the spirit of Rome still lives.

GAME KEY FEATURES:

🏛️ Build and upgrade more than 10 unique structures

  • ⚔️ Train and improve your Roman army

  • 👹 Battle a wide variety of enemies: skeletons, orcs, trolls, goblins, minotaurs, and more

  • 🧠 Defeat 10 unique and challenging bosses

  • 🎲 Use the Wheel of Soldiers to gain surprises: pet dog companion, attack/defense buffs, stronger towers and walls, magic powers, gold, and more

  • 🌦️ Dynamic weather and immersive soundtrack create a unique atmosphere

  • 🛡️ No paid features, no DLCs — one complete game

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
